examples: The faeces contain nitrogen which fertilizes the soil.
They pass a parasite called trypanosoma cruzi in their faeces.
Although these birds did not have it, another study found Bacillus anthracis in vulture faeces.
The team had examined 14 coprolites, as fossil faeces are termed by polite scientists.
The team also recovered 62 coprolites (fossilised faeces), of which 34 were human specimens.
